chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3889 of 2016 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.224/2016. 2. For hearing of main case. 31.01.2025 Mr. Ahmed Ali Hussain, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Counsel states that finalization of assessment is pending due to this petition, however, it may be just and proper for assessment to be finalized in accordance with the law, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. It is further sought that pending above, no further coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Learned Assistant Attorney General articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that petition may be disposed of as aforesaid. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
